ogTitle: Redhill Farms vs Redland Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Redhill Farms and Redland Bay.
heading: Redhill Farms vs Redland Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Redhill Farms, Queensland and Redland Bay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Redhill Farms has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Redland Bay (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Redhill Farms or Redland Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Redhill Farms has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Redland Bay scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Redhill Farms scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Redland Bay scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Redhill Farms or Redland Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Redhill Farms has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
